How to Write a Perfect Missing You Card

30 real missing you messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Missing You Template

1 30 Missing You Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a missing you template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
Hey {{name}} — just wanted to say you're awesome and I hope today treats you right. 💛
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
{{name}}! Thinking of you today. Hope something small and wonderful happens to you this week. ✨
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Hi {{name}}! No big reason for this card — just felt like telling you you matter. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
Dear {{name}} — wishing you a day that's as lovely as you are. 🌸
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
{{name}}, you deserve all the good things today and always. Sending you a big hug! 🤗
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Just because {{name}} is {{name}} — and that's more than enough reason to send a card. 💫
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
Hey beautiful {{name}}! Hope your day is full of sunshine, good coffee, and zero chores. ☀️💖
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
To {{name}} — one of the strongest, kindest, most brilliant women I know. Keep shining. ✨🌹
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
{{name}}, you're doing great. I know life is loud right now — take 5 minutes for yourself today. You've earned it. 💗
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
For {{name}}: you're not just 'doing your best' — you're doing incredible things. Don't forget that. 💐💕
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
{{name}}, you inspire me every single day. Never dim your light for anyone. 💖✨
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
Sending {{name}} a big cozy hug and a gentle reminder: you are so loved. 💞
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Hey {{name}}! Keep being the legend you are. Whatever's on your plate today — you've got this. 💪😎
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
{{name}}, man. You're one of the good ones. Hope today gives you at least one win. 🤙💙
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Dude {{name}} — thanks for being you. The world is a better place with your dumb jokes and your big heart in it. 😂💛
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
{{name}}, whatever you're tackling today: you've prepared, you're capable, and you're gonna nail it. Go get 'em. 🚀
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
Hey {{name}} — just a reminder that you're tougher than you think. And way funnier than you know. 😜💪
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
{{name}}! You work hard, you love hard, and you deserve every good thing coming your way. Cheers. 🍻
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
{{name}} — family isn't just blood. It's the people who show up, and you show up every single time. Love you. ❤️🏡
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
To my favourite person {{name}} in the whole family tree. Thanks for putting up with all of us. 😘💛
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
{{name}}, home is wherever you are. Sending you all my love from near or far. 💙🏡
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
Dear {{name}} — thank you for the way you love our family, even when we're all being ridiculous. So grateful for you. 💕
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
{{name}}, you make family feel like the safest place in the world. Love you always. 🤗❤️
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
To {{name}}: we don't say it enough, but we couldn't do this family thing without you. Thank you. 💛
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
{{name}}! My ride-or-die, my partner-in-crime, my favourite weirdo. Love you to bits. 👯‍♀️💖
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
Hey {{name}} — I was laughing out loud today thinking about [that one stupid thing we did]. Best friends forever, no takebacks. 😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
{{name}}, some friendships are just forever. Ours is definitely one of them. Miss your face. 🧡
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
To {{name}}: thank you for answering my 2am texts, judging my bad decisions, and loving me anyway. You're the best. 🍻💕
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
{{name}}! I don't tell you enough: being your friend is one of the best things in my life. 💛✨
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Shoutout to {{name}} — the friend who's seen me at my worst and still sticks around. You're a legend. 😜🤙
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Missing You Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Be specific — name one real memory or trait about the recipient, not 10 generic adjectives.
  2. 💡 Use the recipient's name twice: once in the opening, once near the end.
  3. 💡 Lead with warmth, end with action: a question, a plan, or an offer to help.
  4. 💡 Keep it 30–70 words — short enough to read in one breath, long enough to feel sincere.
  5. 💡 Read it out loud before sending. If it sounds weird spoken, it'll feel weird received.

3 Bad vs Good: Missing You Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Hi! Hope you are well.
✅ Write this instead
Hey {{name}} — I saw [specific small thing] yesterday and immediately thought of you. Hope you're having the best week. 💛
❌ Don't write this
Good luck! You got this.
✅ Write this instead
Good luck today, {{name}}. You've put in the hours, you know your stuff, and you're gonna crush it. And if you don't — tacos are on me either way. 🌮
❌ Don't write this
Sending love.
✅ Write this instead
Sending you so much love right now, {{name}}. And also a reminder: you're stronger than you think, braver than you feel, and loved way more than you know. 💙

4 Missing You Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing missing you cards.

How long should this card be?

3–5 short sentences, 40–80 words. If it fits on a phone screen without scrolling, it's the right length.

Is it OK to be funny in a {{occasion}} card?

Yes — as long as you pair the joke with one sincere line. Funny alone can feel cheap; funny + warm feels perfect.

Should I handwrite or type this?

Either works. A SendAFun card with your real words inside hits 10x harder than a generic Hallmark card you signed in 2 seconds.

I don't know them super well — what do I write?

One specific observation + one warm wish. "Loved your presentation Tuesday — hope you have a great weekend!" Short, specific, kind. Perfect.
